## Checklist
- [ ] No generated runtime databases, backups, build outputs, package outputs, logs, or temporary files are committed.
- [ ] No sensitive data, credentials, private package URLs, or local environment files are committed.
- [ ] Financial amounts remain integer minor units/cents where touched.
- [ ] Migrations, if touched, were tested against fresh and existing databases.
- [ ] Commands not run are listed with reasons.
